epigraph.text: Make your way straight before me.
epigraph.quote: The line of best fit minimizes the sum of squared residuals.

content.text:
Simple linear regression models the relationship between two 
quantitative variables with a straight line.

content.title: Simple Linear Regression Model
content.content:
\[
 Y_i = \beta_0 + \beta_1 X_i + \epsilon_i
\]
where:

- $\beta_0$ = intercept (value of $Y$ when $X = 0$)

- $\beta_1$ = slope (change in $Y$ for unit change in $X$)

- $\epsilon_i$ = random error, assumed $\Normal(0, \sigma^2)$

content.title: Least Squares Estimates
content.content:
The estimates that minimize $\sum(y_i - \hat{y}_i)^2$ are:
\[
 \hat{\beta}_1 = \frac{\sum(x_i - \xbar)(y_i - \bar{y})}{\sum(x_i - \xbar)^2} = r \frac{S_y}{S_x}
\]
\[
 \hat{\beta}_0 = \bar{y} - \hat{\beta}_1 \xbar
\]
content.label: Theorem

content.text: Residuals measure prediction error. They sum to zero.

content.title: $R^2$
content.content:
\[
 R^2 = \frac{SSR}{SST} = 1 - \frac{SSE}{SST} = r^2
\]
where $SST = \sum(y_i - \bar{y})^2$, $SSR = \sum(\hat{y}_i - \bar{y})^2$, 
$SSE = \sum(y_i - \hat{y}_i)^2$.

$R^2$ is the proportion of variance in $Y$ explained by $X$.
